description: Claim Scope is the forecast-specific graceful-degradation layer. The Gatekeeper verdict answers whether the system may speak; claim scope answers how specific the system may be. Unsupported personal claims fall back to the highest supported scope instead of total abstention.

rules.condition: location_precise_enough == true AND official_forecast_available == true AND observation_available == true AND evidence_fresh == true AND microclimate_confidence in [medium, high] AND uncertainty_bounded == true
official_forecast_available == true AND microclimate_confidence in [medium, high] AND uncertainty_bounded == true
requested_scope in [exact_location, microclimate_adjusted] AND requested_scope_supported == false
rules.behavior: Do not publish the requested specific claim. Fall back to highest_supported_scope if available.
